calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-09-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-23-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keefe appeared via zoom for and with Georgine Giovanni (petitioner).

The Court noted that the objector failed to appear and that he is not hear to expand on his arguments. The matter is taken under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Colohour. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-11-2024 Continued To Oct-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christian Roberts (next of kin/nephew) appeared by zoom in propria persona.

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Roberts stated that he wants to contest the court's final ruling, that he was originally in contact with the petitioner when the petition was filed and then everything went dark, and that he attempted to appear at the initial hearing but was told that it was continued and then he heard nothing. The First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is continued to October 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Roberts is to file his objections on or before October 2, 2024. A response is to be filed before October 16, 2024. If nothing is filed, the court may deem Mr. Roberts' objections waived.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated August 22, 2022 is admitted to probate. Georgine Giovanni is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for November 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2023 Continued To Oct-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
